description: Style Notehidekraft is known for their attention to detail which is evident in this gorgeous leather handbag. Crafted from the finest leather, it's soft to the touch yet built for durability.The detailing on their bags always add a touch of class while their 180 day warranty against manufacturing defects is an added bonus.Product DetailsBrown handbag, one external zipped compartment and one insert compartment on the front, one main compartment separated with a zipped pocket, interior mobile pouch with an inner zipped pocket, one adjustable long handle, legs at the base, branding embossed on the frontMaterial and Care100% genuine leatherWipe with cloth when requiredSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 9 cm
